positive: A stylized, geometric representation of a mountain range at sunrise, rendered in a continuous-line, minimalist aesthetic. The mountains are composed of varying solid color blocks and crisp negative space. The sky utilizes a gradient of soft peach, pale lavender, and warm apricot tones. Foreground elements include abstract, stylized pine silhouettes and simple, graphic sunburst rays. Composition must be balanced and perfectly centered, designed for a wearable textile print. Strong contrast between the solid shapes and the airy gradient background. Ideal vector artwork quality.
